zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Verch RHUN於1329年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根希萊時，她的父親Rhun Ap Gronwy51歲，母親Joan Verch Aron22歲。她於1335年與Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1358年在威爾士享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Verch RHUN于1329年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根希萊时，她的父亲Rhun Ap Gronwy51岁，母亲Joan Verch Aron22岁。她于1335年与Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1358年在威尔士享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Verch RHUN was born in 1329, in Cibwr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Rhun Ap Gronwy, was 51 and her mother, Joan Verch Aron, was 22. She married Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan in 1335. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1358, in Wales, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Verch RHUN est née en 1329, à Cibwr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rhun Ap Gronwy, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Joan Verch Aron, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan en 1335. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1358, à Galles, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Verch RHUN 1329 in Cibwr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rhun Ap Gronwy 51 und ihre Mutter Joan Verch Aron 22. Sie hat 1335 Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1358 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Wales.

Lei sposato Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan nel 1335. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1358, nel Galles, all'età di 29 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Verch RHUN(이)가 1329년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 시브르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhun Ap Gronwy(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Verch Aron(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1335년 Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1358년 웨일스에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Verch RHUN родилась в 1329 г. в местности сибр, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Rhun Ap Gronwy было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Verch Aron, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan в 1335 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1358 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Verch RHUN nació en 1329, en Cibwr, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Rhun Ap Gronwy, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Joan Verch Aron, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan en 1335. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1358, en Gales, a la edad de 29 años.
